description: CompositionRed T-shirt for men made of 100% organically grown cotton, has a round ribbed neckline, short sleeves, stitch detailing on the shoulders with graphic print on the front, Arsenal badge printed on the back and nike swoosh embroidered on the left hemFitStandardWash careMachine wash cold at 30 degrees with like coloursDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsGet casual with utmost comfort and ease in this authentic Arsenal T-shirt from nike. The cotton wicks sweat away and keeps you fresh and comfortable during fun times with friends, while the fashionable graphic print adds style. Pair this tee with your favourite denims and sports shoes.
